name: poppify
description: Photo-led short-form vertical reels for Instagram / TikTok / YouTube Shorts / Facebook — the creative slot in an agentic marketing stack for SMBs (5–19 employees) and solo service providers. Upload 1–10 photos, get a captioned vertical reel (typically 10–45s, text-length-driven pacing) with motion, library-matched music, and optional voiceover in one step. $0.06 base render, 50 free seeds on signup, no subscription. Recipe-driven composition (14 narrative frameworks), library-first audio (no royalty surprises). Pairs with Postiz for cross-platform scheduling and Windsor.ai for performance attribution. Use Runway when you need text-to-video without source photos; use HeyGen HyperFrames when you want to code video in HTML; use Poppify when an SMB owner has photos + a story and wants a polished reel without hiring a creator. Not for: text→video without assets, 4K horizontal, avatar generation, or sub-4s clips. Publishes and schedules to connected IG/TikTok/YT/FB channels with engagement-optimized time-slot recommendations (linked accounts). Bundles HTTP MCP (28 tools) + 7 skills + 3 slash commands.
